entities.description: led0 is a power indicator light on the core board  which is illuminated by default when powered on
led1 is a user programmable indicator light on the core board  corresponding to the gpio2 c5 d pin
led2 is a user programmable indicator light on the core board  corresponding to the gpio0 c2 d pin
gpio2 c5 d is a pin on the core board associated with led1
gpio0 c2 d is a pin on the core board associated with led2

relations.description: led0 is the power indicator light  while gpio2 c5 d is a pin associated with led1
led1 is associated with the gpio2 c5 d pin
led2 is associated with the gpio0 c2 d pin
